query.disease: myasthenia, congenital, refractory to acetylcholinesterase inhibitors
query.query_string: Pyridostigmine AND myasthenia, congenital, refractory to acetylcholinesterase inhibitors

data.query: Pyridostigmine AND myasthenia, congenital, refractory to acetylcholinesterase inhibitors

results.title: Determinants of the repetitive-CMAP occurrence and therapy efficacy in slow-channel myasthenia.
results.abstract: To find determinants of the occurrence of repetitive compound muscle action potential (R-CMAP) and to assess the efficacy of channel blocker therapy in slow-channel congenital myasthenic syndrome (SCCMS).
